title: Mit vierzig Jahren eine Million Dollar auf meinem Anlagekonto zu haben, ist sicherlich ein Grund zum Feiern.🚀
author: Amanda-Medina
selftext: This week my account reached the one million mark. I'm not bragging, it's also my birthday today, so this definitely deserves a celebration.

comments.author: mattgood4446
comments.body:
Found a free Bloomberg-style terminal that’s surprisingly usable.
Live data, clean UI, simple to navigate.
Not the same, but pretty solid for free.
Anyone else tried it?
Make a account and you customized home page more
If you make an account you can customize the Home Screen.
https://terminal.tapinvest.com?ref=BAE978E5

replies.author: Amanda-Medina
replies.body: I'm simply documenting my milestoneshow could that possibly be considered deceptive behavior?

replies.author: cheezweiner
replies.body: Because you didn’t really achieve that milestone. Post your portfolio and all holdings
